name: 14"x72" Floral Table Runner - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Modern Cotton Botanical Table Linens, Spring Decor
description:
This Floral Table Runner from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee enhances your dining experience for any occasion. The rectangular table runner is adorned with a floral print in white and green tones down the center on a dark green backdrop for a beautiful look. The 100% cotton construction with backing helps protect your table from accidental spills, and it can be machine washed for easy care. Pair with coordinating napkins and placemats to create a seamless and chic dining setting.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
